nasb.text: while Paul said in his own defense, “I have committed no offense either against the Law of the Jews or against the temple or against Caesar.”

esv.text: Paul argued in his defense, “Neither against the law of the Jews, nor against the temple, nor against Caesar have I committed any offense.”

cnv.text: 保羅申辯說：“無論對猶太人的律法、聖殿或凱撒，我都沒有罪。”

ccb.text: 保罗为自己辩护说：“我从来没有违背犹太律法，亵渎圣殿或反叛凯撒！”

csbs.text: 保罗申辩说：“无论是对犹太人的律法，或是对圣殿，或是对凯撒，我都没有犯过罪。”
